title: About Bath Economics Society
mission:
BEST exists to close the gap between studying economics and living it.

We're a student-run society at the University of Bath built around one idea — that the best economics education doesn't stop at the lecture theatre door. We connect students with industry, with ideas, and with each other, every single week of the academic year.
benefits:
Joining BEST means getting access to things your degree alone won't give you:

* **Weekly newsletter** — curated economics news, opportunities, and society updates straight to your inbox
* **Speaker events** — economists, analysts, and industry professionals who've actually done it
* **Careers support** — employer evenings, CV workshops, internship pipelines, and alumni connections
* **A real community** — socials, collabs with other societies, and a committee that's genuinely here for you
* **Sponsor access** — direct links to the firms and organisations partnering with BEST
committee:
BEST is entirely student-run. Every event, newsletter, partnership, and social is organised by a committee of Bath economics students who volunteer their time because they genuinely believe in what we're building.

We elect a new committee each academic year - bringing fresh energy, ideas, and ambition to everything we do. Meet the current team on our Committee page.
events:
From intimate reading groups to large-scale employer evenings, BES runs events across three pillars all year long:

* **Academic** - guest lectures, economic debates, and panel discussions on the issues shaping our world
* **Careers** - networking nights, employer showcases, alumni panels, and skills workshops
* **Social** - welcome events, end-of-term socials, and cross-society collaborations

Every event is designed to be genuinely worth your time - not just something to add to your CV.
